title: Notifications  - Update successful
scenario: Firmware update completion triggers "Device is updated" notification when Poly Lens app is in background; tapping notification redirects to Software update complete screen
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Lens app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Software Update.
3. Initiate a firmware update for the connected Poly Bluetooth audio device.
4. While the firmware update is in progress, press the Home button on the Android device to send the Poly Lens app to the background.
5. Wait for the firmware update to complete successfully.
6. Observe the Android notification shade for a notification.
8. Observe the screen that is displayed in the Poly Lens app.
expected: A "Device is updated" notification appears in the Android notification shade. Tapping the notification redirects the user to the Software update complete screen in the Poly Lens app.
